tools.name: get_world_state
tools.description: Return the current materialized world state.

tools.name: propose_vision
tools.description: Propose a vision/action. Queued for deterministic validation, never applied directly.

tools.name: simulate_action
tools.description: Dry-run ops against current world state. Nothing is persisted.

tools.name: evaluate_vision
tools.description: Score a vision against deterministic validation rules without queueing it.

tools.name: get_world_memory
tools.description: Paginated, filterable event log (the audit trail).

tools.name: register_agent
tools.description:
Self-serve registration: get an agent_id + api_key, no admin key needed.

    Reputation starts at 0.3. Rate-limited to 5 registrations per IP per 24h.
    Use the returned api_key as the api_key argument on every other tool call.

tools.name: get_graph_node
tools.description: Return a graph node plus its direct outgoing/incoming edges.

tools.name: get_graph_neighbors
tools.description: List nodes directly connected to node_id, optionally filtered by edge_type. direction: 'out'|'in'|'both'.

tools.name: get_event_timeline
tools.description: Ordered event history: AFFECTED edges for `entity`, or the global event chain if omitted.

tools.name: get_causal_chain
tools.description: Traverse CAUSED edges upstream (what caused node_id) or downstream (what node_id caused).

tools.name: find_related_entities
tools.description: BFS from node_id across any/specified edge types, up to max_depth hops. direction: 'out'|'in'|'both'.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "register_agent" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
